site_conditions_summary: Flat lot with no hydrology concerns. Los Cabos coastal zone — site is within the ZOFEMAT (federal maritime zone) buffer and may require SEMARNAT environmental impact statement depending on precise distance to coastline. Local municipal building permit through H. Ayuntamiento de Los Cabos required.
required_documents: SEMARNAT coastal zone clearance or environmental screening
Municipal use-of-land permit (licencia de uso de suelo)
blockers: SEMARNAT coastal clearance — timeline 4-8 weeks if required
